description: This large, blackened cauldron is made entirely of interlocking bones bound together with shells. Bone wraiths use it in a dark and mysterious ritual to create new beings of their own kind. The cauldron's interior is filled with a steaming, bubbling liquid that emits a spicy, earthy aroma. Bones and other mysterious ingredients are thrown into the cauldron, where they are boiled during the ritual creating new bone wraiths.
name: Bone Cauldron
